title: DORA metrics
description: Shape of .agent/dora.json. See doc/adr/0004-dora-metrics-tracking.md for rationale.

deploys_per_week.description: Deployment Frequency: average successful deploys per week. null = not yet measured.

lead_time_hours.description: Lead Time for Changes: median hours from commit to production. null = not yet measured.

change_fail_rate.description: Change Failure Rate: fraction of deploys that cause a failure, in [0, 1]. null = not yet measured.

mttr_hours.description: Mean Time to Restore: median hours to recover from a production failure. null = not yet measured.
